subject: Board Compensation Committee Report
body:
Dear Committee Members,

Please find below the executive compensation benchmarking analysis for our annual review:

CEO Total Compensation:
- Base: $350K (market median: $380K)
- Bonus target: 100% of base (market: 100-125%)
- Equity: $1.2M annual grant (market: $1.5M at our stage)
- Total: $1.9M vs market median of $2.3M

Recommendations:
1. Adjust CEO base to $380K to match median
2. Increase equity grants across C-suite by 15% to improve retention
3. Implement performance-based vesting for 40% of equity grants
4. Add long-term incentive plan tied to 3-year TSR targets

Total incremental cost: $680K annually
Retention risk mitigation value: High (two C-suite members approached by recruiters this quarter)

Full report attached for your review ahead of the March 28th meeting.
